headline: How The Nextdoor Holdings (NXDR) Story Is Shifting With Neutral Targets Around US$2
summary: Price targets on Nextdoor Holdings have recently shifted into a tight range between about US$2.10 and US$2.20, with some cuts from earlier targets such as US$2.40. This clustering around the low US$2 area lines up with Neutral ratings, as analysts weigh slightly better reported execution against what they still view as a balanced risk and reward setup. As you read on, you will see how to interpret these moves and track the way the story around Nextdoor continues to evolve. Analyst Price...
